data.businessDescription: Premium boutique strength and conditioning facilities focusing on personal training, custom athletic meal planning, and biometric tracking. Our market segment is high-earning professionals looking for elite body transformations.
data.whyChooseUs: Unlike corporate box gyms, we provide fully personalized Olympic coach matching, medical-grade body scans every 30 days, and private hyperbaric chamber therapy sessions.
data.specialSauce: Our custom mobile app directly synchronizes with clients' wearable health trackers and feeds real-time nutrition deficits directly to our in-house private chefs.
data.servicesOffered:
1. Elite Personal Training Packages
2. Biometric InBody Body Composition Analysis
3. Private Chef Prepared Meal Handouts
4. Infrared Sauna Recovery Sessions
data.specialOffers: Founder membership promotion: 25% off personal training services for the first 3 months with zero signup fees.
data.companyHistory: Established in 2024 with a single premium location. Expanding to 3 physical workspaces by late 2026.
data.competitors: Equinox, OrangeTheory, local premium powerlifting garages.
data.ownerVision: To build an iconic physical-digital hybrid fitness brand that bridges medical scientific data with premium functional luxury.
data.faq:
Q: Do you offer corporate group discounts?
A: Yes, packages starting at 10+ employees enjoy custom rates.

Q: Is parking included?
A: Yes, all memberships include free private underground valet parking.
data.additionalNotes: Currently hosted on Wix under a basic plan. We need a modern, high-speed custom React application with premium motion designs to match our luxurious brand alignment.
